info.title: Mobile App Backend API
info.description: REST API for root info, health check, and user management.

409.description: Phone number or username already exists

401.description: Refresh token is missing, invalid, or expired

500.description: Invalid id format or server error

get.summary: Lấy danh sách comments theo postId (phân trang)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID của entity (post, food, restaurant, v.v.)

400.description: Bad Request - postId không hợp lệ

401.description: Unauthorized - Token không hợp lệ hoặc hết hạn

400.description: Bad Request - Thiếu content hoặc postId không hợp lệ

404.description: Not Found - postId không tồn tại

403.description: Forbidden - Không phải chủ sở hữu comment

404.description: Not Found - Comment không tồn tại

400.description: Bad Request - Thiếu cmtId hoặc type không hợp lệ

404.description: Not Found - Comment không tồn tại

409.description: Conflict - Đã like hoặc chưa like

put.summary: Phản hồi comment từ người bán

400.description: Bad Request - Thiếu cmtId hoặc dữ liệu không hợp lệ

404.description: Not Found - Comment không tồn tại

post.description: Create a new order from one shop only. Each item must include a valid foodId and quantity.

400.description: Missing required fields, invalid item quantity, or items from more than one shop

404.description: One or more foods were not found

get.summary: Get all user's orders with pagination
Get current seller's orders with filters
get.description: Retrieve orders assigned to the authenticated seller. Supports filtering by date range and status.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start date filter. The API includes orders from 00:00:00 of this day.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: End date filter. The API includes orders until 23:59:59 of this day.

400.description: Invalid status value or invalid transition

patch.summary: Update order status by assigned seller
patch.description: Allow the assigned seller to move an order through the seller workflow.

400.description: Invalid orderId format, missing status, invalid status value, or invalid transition

403.description: Forbidden - seller role required or order does not belong to this seller

400.description: Invalid orderId format or order cannot be cancelled at this stage

get.summary: Get all categories in hierarchical tree structure

409.description: Conflict - Cannot delete category with child categories

get.summary: Get all foods with search, category filter, rating filter, and sorting

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter by category (includes all descendant categories)

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort rating order: desc (high to low), asc (low to high)

400.description: You do not have a shop or invalid food data

403.description: Forbidden - not owner of this shop
Forbidden - not owner of this shop

get.summary: Get all shops with optional search and filter

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort rating order: desc (high to low), asc (low to high)

403.description: Forbidden - Only seller can create shop

409.description: Conflict - Each user can only create one shop

403.description: Forbidden - Only seller can access this endpoint

404.description: Shop not found for current seller

post.summary: Sync any shop profit by shopId (admin only)
post.description: Recalculate shop profit from COMPLETED orders for the selected shop.

parameters.name: shopId
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the shop to sync

post.summary: Sync any shop rating count by shopId (admin only)
post.description: Placeholder admin endpoint for recalculating rating count of a selected shop.

parameters.name: shopId
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the shop to sync

500.description: Invalid id format or server error

403.description: Forbidden - Only shop owner can update

get.summary: Search foods by name with Elasticsearch

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Keyword to search by food name only

post.description: Creates the foods Elasticsearch index if needed, then indexes all non-draft foods from MongoDB.

UserUpdateInput.description: All fields are optional for update.

ShopCreateInput.description: userId is taken from the authenticated seller token

about.example: Updated: Specialized in authentic Vietnamese street food

ShopUpdateInput.description: All fields are optional for update.
